default_notch_width.description: Fallback width of the notch if system detection fails.

default_menu_bar_height.description: Standard menu bar height for MacBook Pro with notch.

fallback_menu_bar_height.description: Standard menu bar height for non-notch displays.

panel_width.description: The fixed width of the expanded notch panel.

home_view_limit.description: Maximum number of widgets allowed in the Home View.

icon_slot_width.description: Width of each icon slot including spacing.

bar_padding.description: Horizontal padding at the start and end of the icon bars.

notch_breathing_room.description: Total extra gap around the physical notch width.

max_expanded_width.description: The absolute maximum width the island can expand to.

minimized_threshold.description: Default minutes before an event to show in the notch.

ongoing_transition_threshold.description: Minutes before the next event to switch view if current is ongoing.

upcoming_events_count.description: Number of upcoming events to show in the list.

expanded_min_width.description: Minimum width for the expanded calendar module.

default_duration.description: The default duration for a new timer in minutes.

alarm_chime_delay.description: Delay between the first and second alarm chime.

expanded_min_width.description: Minimum width for the expanded timer module.

expand_duration.description: Duration of the panel expansion animation.
